item.title: sudo for High Sierra [Security]
item.itunes:title: sudo for High Sierra [Security]
item.itunes:author: Markospoko
item.itunes:summary:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p4 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for High Sierra macOS with newer clang, it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources
*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
item.description:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p4 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for High Sierra macOS with newer clang, it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources
*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p4 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for High Sierra macOS with newer clang, it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources
*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]

item.title: Recover Disc Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Disc Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Disc Mac
(Utilities)
Have you experienced a pathetic situation that when you unintentionally or intentionally format hard disk and lost entire stored files? In this concern, Restoredeletedfiles.org Company provides professional DDR data recovery software for Mac OS X to get back all important files and folders back which deleted from trash in simplified way. Technically powerful data undelete software for Macintosh OS X quickly recover entire missing or misplaced crucial text documents, favorite songs collections, valuable project files and other documents from formatted hard disk or corrupted USB drives. Comprehensive recover disc mac program provides effective and fast solution to rescue misplaced or lost data and files from different types of storage devices including SD Card, MMC Card, pen drive, flash drives, memory card, memory sticks, portable MP3 players, digital camera, camcorder etc in less span of time. Technically advance Macintosh data salvage tool get back all snapshots, audio/video files, text files, important documents, project files, official data and personal documents after using Shift+Del keys. Advance featured recover disc mac software regain all multimedia and image files which corrupted due to virus attack on USB drive or camera memory card. Easy to operate recover disc mac utility retrieve missing encrypted, executable, zipped, RAW and compressed files from hard disk partition with minimal time and efforts. Essential Features: * Award winning professional file retrieval program for Apple Macintosh OS X supports all kinds of USB removable digital media and HFS/HFS+ partition HDD. * Advance recover disc mac application rescue entire data if any system generated error message display while attached usb drive on Apple Macintosh installed machine. * Technically strong Apple data restoration application uses extensive scan to rescue file and folders from corrupt operating system in less span of time.

[read more]

[read more]

item.title: Disk Recover Mac Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Disk Recover Mac Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Disk Recover Mac Program
(Utilities)
Disk Recover Mac application supports all latest Mobile Phone brands including Sony, Nokia, Samsung, Ericsson, Motorola, Siemens, Panasonic, T-Mobile etc. Amazing Disk Recover Mac is completely capable to reinstate data even if lost or erased due to Human mistakes, Virus or worm attacks, Blocked mobile phone, accidentally crashed phone book memory, Failure mobile battery or more similar reasons. Disk Recover Mac application get back your lost vital phone memory salvaged data without any data failure. Disk Recover Mac application for MAC has advanced inbuilt disk scanning mechanism option to search and renovate lost mobile phone data. So if you have accidentally lost your memorable snaps, wallpaper, video clipping, audio etc don’t be desperate because with the assistance of this competent tool you can easily regain your all kind of lost data in an easy way. Amazing tool aids you to search and retrieve all lost contact numbers, pictures, photos, images and other valuable data from your mobile phone. Disk Recover Mac program without difficulty recuperates your accidentally erased phone book numbers along with the contact name with this mobile phone data recuperation program. Capable Disk Recover Mac Restores your whole lost data from formatted or reformatted memory cards of your cell phones. Disk Recover Mac Restores regains your accidentally erased audios /videos clipping saved in mobile phone memory. Disk Recover Mac data salvage program facilitates highly interactive GUI feature with inbuilt manual help. Features: * Disk Recover Mac application is easy to operate and amazingly recovers corrupted data. * Disk Recover Mac program offers fast recovery of all lost cell phone data. * Disk Recover Mac tool capably restores all kind of missing data in a unique way. * Disk Recover Mac Regain deleted or misplaced memorable pictures, snapshots and other valuable data from your mobile phone at reasonable price.

[read more]

item.title: Digi Picture Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digi Picture Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digi Picture Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Picture Recovery Software for restoring all crashed wallpapers, snaps, pictures, photo album etc in some mouse clicks. Expert picture rescue utility helps users to restore misplaced wedding photographs from computer hard disk using inbuilt disk scanning feature. Reliable photo restoration utility recovers erased wallpapers and saves at user specified location on computer system within few minutes.
[read more]

Reliable photo restoration utility recovers erased wallpapers and saves at user specified location on computer system within few minutes.

item.title: PC Card Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PC Card Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
PC Card Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Card data recovery utility provides extraordinary feature for users to regain entire erased data due to any crucial reason such as logically corrupted or crashed memory card. PC Card Recovery software is capable to restore missed important official documents from branded memory cards due to improper handling or malicious disk format done by human beings. www.sdcarddatarecovery.org provides simplified solution to recover almost every file that has been misplaced or deleted due to damaged file system, software malfunction, formatted memory card and other similar reasons in short time period. PC Card Recovery application provides GUI which helps users to restore their missed files and folders from various memory cards without seeking any external help. Easy to use data restoration program allows user to preview their lost files due to worm infection or human improper activities before starting actual recovery process. Cost effective computer card restoration tool has capable to retrieves various file types such as jpeg, tif, png, gif, exif, tiff, riff, mid, wmf, mov, midi, avi, mpeg, wav, wmv, doc, ppt, mp3, mp4, txt, mpg, jpg, bmp etc from inaccessible memory card. File restoration tool is compatible with all major brands including Fujifilm, HP, Kodak, Konica, Mustek, Nikon, Kingston, Micron, SanDisk etc to recover deleted audios and videos.
[read more]
item.description:

item.title: Disc Recovery Mac Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Disc Recovery Mac Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Disc Recovery Mac Application
(Utilities)
Developer offers disc recovery Mac program at restoredeletedfiles.org that facilitates user to easily regenerate digital media files from removable USB storage drives without affecting the quality of the original lost data. Powerful and efficient removable media data retrieval software provides support for all sort of USB removable media storage devices including PDA(Personal Digital Assistance), multimedia mobile phone, pen drives, flash memory, external hard disk drives, iPod devices, Camcorders and other similar devices. Advanced disc recovery Mac application reforms lost picture, music, document files and folders from logically crashed pen drives providing user option to reform specific data files or retrieve complete set of files found by scanning removable drive storage. Versatile removable USB media data recovery program at restoredeletedfiles.org reforms any format of digital data in minimal duration of time period having support for all Apple Macintosh operating system versions. Affordable disc recovery Mac software retrieves digital files and folders from external media providing user simple to operate interface having complete help manual throughout drive scanning and data reformation process so even novice person can also perform recovery without any special guidance. Professional USB removable media revival application retrieves digital data records lost due to improper handling of removable media and inaccessible drives showing common logical errors while trying to access external data drives on computer machines. Features * Mac external media data rescue software executes on all major versions of Apple operating system. * Data retrieval Mac program revives data from formatted and reformatted removable media drives. * Disc recovery Mac software recue data lost due to virus infection and logical storage drive corruption. * Removable media data recovery application recreates photo, song, document, movie in no time span.

[read more]
item.description:
Disc Recovery Mac Application

item.title: DataVare OST To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: DataVare OST To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datavare01
item.itunes:summary:
DataVare OST To PST Converter
(Utilities)
Free Download DataVare OST To PST Converter to migrate/export OST files to PST in bulk without creating any errors. It performs with all versions of Outlook, even installed on both operating systems such as Windows and Mac. This utility converts the whole data from Outlook OST files like - emails, contacts, attachments, calendars, Notes, etc. It also provides various advanced features that make the OST conversion process easy and fast, even any kind of user operate it easily without facing any difficulties. For the comfort of users, they offer a free demo pack to all users which migrates the first 25 items free from OST to PST files without paying any fee, and users learn how to work.
Read More:- https://www.datavare.com/software/ost-to-pst-converter-expert.html
[read more]
item.description:
DataVare OST To PST Converter
(Utilities)
Free Download DataVare OST To PST Converter to migrate/export OST files to PST in bulk without creating any errors. This utility converts the whole data from Outlook OST files like - emails, contacts, attachments, calendars, Notes, etc. It also provides various advanced features that make the OST conversion process easy and fast, even any kind of user operate it easily without facing any difficulties. For the comfort of users, they offer a free demo pack to all users which migrates the first 25 items free from OST to PST files without paying any fee, and users learn how to work.

[read more]

This utility converts the whole data from Outlook OST files like - emails, contacts, attachments, calendars, Notes, etc. It also provides various advanced features that make the OST conversion process easy and fast, even any kind of user operate it easily without facing any difficulties. item.title: P2 Card Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: P2 Card Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
P2 Card Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Company offers P2 Card Recovery software has capability to retrieve deleted images and pictures from logically corrupted memory cards available in market. Memory card salvation program enable user to preview their lost important documents from virus infected memory card before starting actual recovery process. MMC card restoration tool is designed and created by well experience engineers to regain all your lost documents from inaccessible memory cards. www.sdcarddatarecovery.org offers cost effective data rescue utility which is capable to regain and revive almost every type of file that has been erased due to human performed errors from branded memory card. Comprehensive P2 Card Recovery software has capability to rescue misplaced text documents such as txt, doc, pdf, excel, ppt and spread sheets from memory card due to improper file transmission. Simplified data salvation application has capability to restore missed important official files due to human insecure handling of various popular memory cards. Mass storage retrieval program allows user to restore their unreadable documents and files from MMC card without seeking any external help. File restoration tool is used to retrieve different audios files like amr, wav, mp3, midi and other formats from human performed activities within less time duration.
[read more]
